<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava (`L`), so I should not move forward. To eventually reach the goal at row 08 column H, I need to go down first. From facing right, turning clockwise will make me face down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

I am at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is safe (`.`), so the best next move is to advance forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
